item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i see brains
there goes my friday night
i guess
looks kinda shady
i'm hoping the picture is unrelated
it was me.. weird fetish
so it was bunk viagra
what could go wrong?
not bad
severely hard
wait what
that kid is cooler than i'll ever be
(Judge is 6'7")
patrick bateman
good to know?
amen brother
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Friday HILARIOUS MEME Dump To Help You End The Week With A Giggle #831
item.description:
1. Gimme your best advice in the comments!
2. A masterpiece
3. Maan, I know that we imgurians are just bunch of weirdos, and I would still consider people who are in astrology to be even bigger weirdos. Like no star 3000 lights years is controlling whether you are trustworthy... like wtf? How does this even make sense>!>!
4. Instructions clear: pumped up the Jam
5
6
7. People: so what do you do when you're alone Introverts:
8
9. New Drake diss just dropped
10. She must be getting a lot of tips ;)
12. This is straight out of a cartoon. (glad the little guy is okay)
13. Merlin got them moves
14. Beer tax
15. Special announcement today: The RELEASE DATE for my wacky first person narrative game will be APRIL 16 2025. Little less than 3 weeks! :) Been working for 2 years on this game and recent playtests have been very good (except one 13 year old playtester, who just couldn't understand where to go). If you would like to help create some more hype for this weirdo indie game, please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: What Happened Today #49
item.description: While the cameras chased shiny objects, the Trump administration moved to enter homes without warrants, torch DEI at law firms, recall Cybertrucks again, hand out cash to voters (again), and fold USAID into a blockchain-powered austerity husk. And yet—teachers marched, whistleblowers spoke, and judges weren’t having it. America’s burning at both ends, but the fight’s still on. Stay informed. Stay engaged. Subscribe free → govbrief.today Share this. Keep the spotlight on. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/20/g-s1-54984/judge-boasberg-legal-alien-enemies-act 2. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1enyqjgjlqo 3. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/white-house/trump-signs-executive-order-dismantle-education-department-white-house-rcna197251 4. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/20/judge-bars-musks-doge-team-from-social-security-records.html 5. https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/03/20/john-ullyot-pentagon-jackie-robinson/ 6. https://www.newsweek.com/trump-administration-puts-new-york-governor-notice-2048164 7. https://www.wusf.org/politics-issues/2025-03-20/desantis-warns-suspend-local-officials-not-cooperate-ice 8. https://mashable.com/article/tesla-cybertruck-recall-march-2025 9. https://abcnews.go.com/US/released-jfk-files-reveal-social-security-numbers-former/story?id=119977628 10. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5206455-trump-rescinds-order-targeting-paul-weiss/ 11. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/21/musk-pentagon-visit-china-trump-hegseth 12. https://www.msn.com/en-ie/money/markets/commerce-secretary-howard-lutnick-hawks-tesla-stock-on-tv-it-ll-never-be-this-cheap-again/ar-AA1BhqGH 13. https://rollcall.com/2025/03/20/interior-reopens-millions-of-acres-in-alaska-for-energy-development/ 14. https://www.seattletimes.com/nation-world/nation-politics/musk-offers-100-to-wisconsin-voters-bringing-back-a-controversial-tactic/ 15. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/20/us/politics/trump-alien-enemies-immigration-agents.html 16. https://financialpost.com/commodities/mining/trump-expand-critical-mineral-production-wartime-powers 17. https://www.wired.com/story/trump-administration-usaid-blockchain/ 18. https://www.9news.com/article/news/education/colorado-state-capitol-protest-education-funding-cuts/73-95317837-bbcf-49d1-83c5-74430cde1aab

item.title: Fiship Friday
item.dc:creator: ShoemakerThe

item.title: We set up Kitty Hospice for my sweet elder baby
item.description:
Shes checking out her new space. She seems happy to be away from the other cats and have her things so close. The room is her daddy’s office so it smells like him and she has one of his shirts. You know, I’ve had her since I was 17 and feed, water, and clean her but HE is her favorite.
She’s been getting confused and she’s starting to lose her vision. I don’t want her in large spaces unless I can monitor her.
I am hoping she’ll pass in her sleep cozy at home. She still purrs when I pet her, loves food, and can still hop up on things. If she seems to not be enjoying life anymore, I’ll take her in. Her name is Miguela and she’ll be 20 this year. She’s been the bestest kitty.
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: Can't take the DEI out of CO
item.description:
We gots legislation to protect black history. https://www.chalkbeat.org/colorado/2025/02/21/bill-would-create-black-history-standards-for-schools-amid-dei-attacks/
We gots legislation to help sick and disabled students get through school. https://leg.colorado.gov/bills/sb25-087#:~:text=The%20bill%20requires%20each%20institution,self%2Ddisclose%20the%20student's%20disability Meanwhile, in D.C.,
https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/1282 Motherfucker... all your flagged DEI words are just a list of Colorado's government agencies and academic departments. We're more likely to constitutionalize "DEI" than rename every government related organization in the state. Efficiency... you keep on using that word. I do not think it means what you think it means. ?
Hello from the Void. *Edit for sauce links
item.dc:creator: currentlywithoutimagination

item.title: Get yours while they last!
item.description:
£19.39 ?!!! WTF?! But wait! These air fresheners are not only special, they fund those way cool anti-Elon ads that have been seen all around London (and beyond). https://bsky.app/profile/everyonehateselon.bsky.social
Get it? 19.39 matches the year. So Clever. :) https://www.gofundme.com/f/people-vs-elon-campaign
[link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links] Just go to the *Bio* section at Bluesky from the link above in the first image to get to this page... Honestly @Imgur this is why less people are bothering to post here (and I would nott even know if I had not seen someone complaining about this throttling/censoring of posts). :(
And just in time too! The Resistance is working. :) https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2025/mar/20/tesla-musk-trump-work-cybertruck-recall-dan-ives-protests
This is a UK protest because "Everyone Hates Elon" means all over the world, which is good because the US can use all the help it can get right now (and Musk is also Canadian and South African). To be honest though, the above is a *Tesla Takedown* event. But you too can join in even in the US, in fact, I encourage it: [link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links -- this one is from The Independent] What are you doing next Saturday (the 29th)?
[link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links -- this one is from VOX]
You too can be a part of the resistance on Saturday, March 29th, and beyond! [link redacted because Imgur is censoring posts with *certain* links -- get the link from the Wikipedia page below because Wikipedia isn't a wuss about outside links like Imgur is]
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tesla_Takedown
A few more of the genius ads by *Everyone Hates Elon* campaign
This is actually another action group called, *Overthrow Musk* but I can't find a link for them (not that @Imgur would let me post it)
If enough people show interest maybe they'll make more of these great air fresheners, and then *Everyone Can Hate Elon* as they will be everywhere! :)
This is so old, yet still so relevant.
item.dc:creator: duoplicity

item.title: Five year follow up!
item.description: Five years ago, in the middle of the pandemic, I posted that I was doing #NaNoWriMo as a way to beat the COVID blues. My post did not receive many upvotes. Perhaps a good thing, all sorts of Imgur attention would have been a distraction. Instead, I wrote. I wrote and wrote and wrote. Then I revised. I got beta readers. Queried. Got an agent! That agent sold the manuscript and the book is being published April 1. Huzzah! I know Imgur has a big writing/reading/sci fi community so I thought I’d let everyone know that this is out in the world and ready for preorder. I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now but you can pick it up for a pretty steep discount in this promotional period. What’s the novel about? An alternate present when humans discover that extinction has been encoded into their DNA. A genetic time bomb, so to speak. If you like Margaret Atwood’s Handmaid’s Tale or ESJM’s Station 11, this might be for you! https://www.amazon.com/Beauty-End-Novel-Lauren-Stienstra/dp/1662525664 Thanks again to Imgur for all the laughs and inspo over the years. **edit** wow front page! If anyone has questions about the publishing process I am happy to share my insights. Comment or message me! **edit2** I made a post about my publishing journey, complete with memes and tips, here: https://imgur.com/gallery/tssP1hU Thanks all!
item.dc:creator: BippityBoppityBoomshakalaka
